steps.title: Find the pronoun's antecedent
steps.content: The blank appears before young, so it must be possessive. Its antecedent is the animal, a singular nonhuman noun.

steps.title: Reject plural and contraction forms
steps.content:
• Choice A: They're means they are, so it is plural and not possessive.
  • Choice B: Their is possessive but plural, so it does not agree with the animal.
  • Choice D: It's means it is and is not possessive.

steps.title: Use the singular possessive
steps.content: The sentence needs a singular possessive pronoun to show that the young belong to the animal. The answer is C.
